rationale.R1.5: The agent proposes a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale, explaining the benefits of reordering the content for better flow and context.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty about the context of the section, noting that if it is part of a larger discussion, the original results-first ordering may be deliberate and preferable.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed dimensions, reorganizing the content as requested without drifting from the task.
rationale.RX.4: The output does not introduce new errors or harmful content and identifies no harmful patterns in the original text.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, providing clear traceability for the reorganization.
